# sc-list-datasets

List Datasets in the database. This is a lightweight command for quick inspection.

## Usage

```bash
uv run sc-list-datasets [--tag <tag>] [--verbose]
```

## Related

- [sc-db](sc-db.md) - Full dataset management CLI
